name: minutes
description: Give Claude a local workspace for your meetings and voice memos: search transcripts, inspect decisions and commitments, prep for calls, record and process audio, confirm speakers, and open the dashboard from your meetings folder.
long_description:
Minutes connects Claude Desktop to the meeting corpus on your computer. It reads structured Markdown in `~/meetings/`, exposes MCP tools for recall, prep, research, recording, transcription, speaker correction, and follow-through, and keeps the source of truth as files on disk that any MCP client can read.

Search, recording, context, and dashboard tools • Interactive MCP App dashboard • Prompt templates

**What Claude can do:**
• Search and retrieve meeting transcripts, voice memos, decisions, commitments, questions, and people context.
• Prepare for upcoming calls, research topics across your history, and build person briefings from your own corpus.
• Start and stop recordings, add timestamped notes, process audio files, and read live transcripts when configured.
• Confirm speaker identities once and reuse those overlays across desktop, CLI, SDK, and MCP surfaces.
• Use desktop-context rewind and activity summaries around recordings and live sessions.
• Open an interactive MCP App dashboard inside Claude conversations.

**Setup:** `npx minutes-mcp` gets search, browsing, and the dashboard running right away. For recording and local transcription, Minutes can auto-install the CLI on first use, or you can install it with `brew install silverstein/tap/minutes` or `cargo install minutes-cli`, then run `minutes setup --model tiny`, `minutes setup --parakeet`, or `minutes setup --demo`.

**Privacy:** your meeting files stay on your disk. Local transcription runs on your computer when configured. Summarization is opt-in; when enabled, transcript text is sent only to the endpoint you choose. Audio stays local.

tools.name: start_recording
tools.description: Start recording audio from the default input device

tools.name: stop_recording
tools.description: Stop the current recording and process it

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Check if a recording is currently in progress

tools.name: list_processing_jobs
tools.description: List background processing jobs for recent recordings

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: List recent meetings and voice memos

tools.name: search_meetings
tools.description: Search meeting transcripts and voice memos

tools.name: get_meeting
tools.description: Get full transcript of a specific meeting

tools.name: activity_summary
tools.description: Summarize meeting-adjacent desktop context for a linked artifact, context session, or time window

tools.name: search_context
tools.description: Search desktop-context events across app focus and captured window titles, including opted-in browser titles

tools.name: get_moment
tools.description: Show the local desktop-context rewind around a linked artifact, session, or timestamp

tools.name: process_audio
tools.description: Process an audio file through the transcription pipeline

tools.name: add_note
tools.description: Add a timestamped note to the current recording or an existing meeting

tools.name: consistency_report
tools.description: Flag conflicting decisions and stale commitments

tools.name: get_person_profile
tools.description: Build a profile for a person across all meetings

tools.name: research_topic
tools.description: Research a topic across meetings, decisions, and follow-ups

tools.name: qmd_collection_status
tools.description: Check if the Minutes output directory is registered as a QMD collection

tools.name: register_qmd_collection
tools.description: Register the Minutes output directory as a QMD collection

tools.name: start_dictation
tools.description: Start dictation mode — speech to clipboard and daily notes

tools.name: stop_dictation
tools.description: Stop dictation mode

tools.name: track_commitments
tools.description: List open and stale commitments, optionally filtered by person

tools.name: relationship_map
tools.description: All contacts with relationship scores and losing-touch alerts

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List enrolled voice profiles for speaker identification

tools.name: confirm_speaker
tools.description: Confirm or correct speaker attribution in a meeting transcript

tools.name: get_meeting_insights
tools.description: Query structured meeting insights (decisions, commitments, questions) with confidence filtering

tools.name: start_live_transcript
tools.description: Start a live transcript session for real-time meeting transcription

tools.name: read_live_transcript
tools.description: Read utterances from the active live transcript with optional cursor or time window

tools.name: open_dashboard
tools.description: Open the Meeting Intelligence Dashboard in the browser — visual overview of conversation memory

tools.name: ingest_meeting
tools.description: Extract facts from a meeting and update the knowledge base (person profiles, log, index)

tools.name: knowledge_status
tools.description: Show the current state of the knowledge base — configuration, adapter, people count, log entries

prompts.name: meeting_prep
prompts.text: Search my past meetings about ${arguments.meeting_topic}. Find relevant decisions, open action items, and context I should review before the meeting.

prompts.name: weekly_review
prompts.text: List my meetings from the past week and summarize key decisions, action items, and commitments. Flag anything overdue.

prompts.name: find_action_items
prompts.description: Find action items assigned to someone
prompts.text: Search for all open action items assigned to ${arguments.person}. Show what was committed, when, and in which meeting.

prompts.name: person_briefing
prompts.description: Get a briefing on a person before a meeting
prompts.text: Build a profile for ${arguments.name} across all my meetings. What topics do we discuss? What commitments are open? What decisions have we made together?

prompts.name: topic_research
prompts.description: Research a topic across all meetings
prompts.text: Research ${arguments.topic} across all my meetings. Show related decisions, open follow-ups, and which meetings discussed it most.

prompts.name: start_meeting
prompts.text: Start recording a meeting titled '${arguments.title}'. I'll transcribe it locally when we're done.

meetings_dir.title: Meetings Directory
meetings_dir.description: Where meeting transcripts and voice memos are saved

minutes_home.title: Minutes Data Directory
minutes_home.description: Where Minutes stores its configuration, logs, and PID files
